text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo has offered to give Kawakami Princess
a dance lesson, and I join them as an observer.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now then, King, I'm ready to begin today's dance
lesson.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. Wasn't that a proper bow? I wonder if
that form will translate into your dancing. So,
let's—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: GET THIS STARTED!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Humph! Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hold it right there! What in the world are you
doing?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What am I doing? Well, this is a dance lesson,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You told me that the key to beautiful dancing is
mustering enough physical strength to maintain
your posture, remember? ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for the... If you're not even fooling around,
that just makes it harder to scold you for it!
choice_data_list: At the very least, let's stop with the punches.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
P-precisely! You're aware that dancing isn't about
hitting people, right?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! B-but then what should I be doing?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I get it! It's about leg strength rather than arm
strength! So kicks instead of punches!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: No, you dolt! No kicking! Only steps!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Steps! Like this?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're still lacking! If your aim is to be a first-rate
dancer, you must focus on every detail of your
movements, down to the tips of your toes!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Understood! I'll step hard enough to break
through the floorboards! Humph! Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to the instruction of her strict teacher,
Kawakami Princess's dancing becomes even more
extraordinary!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what a great idea! King Halo enchants me
with her dancing every time I see it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Don't just watch! Come now, you dance too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! I actually get to dance together with
King!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump! Thwack!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait... Stop! Stooop!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You're being way too aggressive. This is no
different from when you were throwing punches
every which where!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Really? That's weird... I'm only trying to dance as
usual.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Just... watch how you're moving! You'd better not
even think about hitting me, understand?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, I'd never do something like that! So
please don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After more practice, Kawakami Princess manages
to further hone her dancing skills thanks to King
Halo's careful instruction.
